mapper.sql: docId, knowledgeBaseId, userId, docName, docType, filePath, fileSize, chunkCount, charCount, status, errorMsg, state, createTime, updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_knowledge_doc (knowledgeBaseId, userId, docName, docType, filePath, fileSize, chunkCount, charCount, status, errorMsg, state) VALUES (#{knowledgeBaseId}, #{userId}, #{docName}, #{docType}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{chunkCount}, #{charCount}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{state})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_knowledge_doc SET state = '0' WHERE docId = #{docId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_knowledge_doc WHERE knowledgeBaseId = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND state = '1' AND status = 'ready' ORDER BY createTime DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_knowledge_doc WHERE state = '1' AND status = 'ready' AND knowledgeBaseId IN
#{id}
ORDER BY createTime DESC
